description: Movement Explorer — a Vite React app with Aptos wallet connectivity and no Notifi integration in the pinned baseline. Used to validate the smallest working `notifi-react-integration` card-modal path.

setup.notes: Requires pnpm 8 and a React/Vite toolchain. The app uses Aptos wallet adapters for on-chain wallet connectivity.

eval_use.what_agent_should_do: Add the smallest working NotifiContextProvider + NotifiCardModal integration into the existing app structure, reusing the app's Aptos wallet state for on-chain auth.
eval_use.success_looks_like: NotifiContextProvider is placed near the existing wallet/layout boundary, NotifiCardModal renders in a sensible location, the Aptos wallet adapter state is reused for signing, and no fake tenantId/cardId values are hardcoded without flagging them as placeholders.
